pages.text:
ENTERPRISE D-SERIES
PCIe Gen5 
Data Center Storage 
Solution in E1.S 
Form Factor
PASCARI  D200
• NVMe 2.0
• 128 Namespaces
• Power Loss Protection (PLP)
• ISE, TCG Opal 2.0 support
• AES-XTS 256-bit Encryption
• Data Integrity and Protection
• End-to-End Data Path 
Protection
• SECDED
• Sanitize
• NVMe-MI (Management 
Interface) 
• SMBus
Product Features
Sequential Write
Up to 8,500 MB/s 
Interface
Sequential Read
Up to 14,000 MB/s
Random Write
Up to 880K IOPS
Random Read
Up to 3,300K IOPS
Capacity
Up to 7.68TB
Form Factor
E1.S
DWPD
1, 3
PCIe 5.0 x4

(1) 1 TB = 1012 bytes.
(2) Sequential Performance is based on FIO on Linux, 512K, with QD=32, 1 job.
(3) Random Performance is based on FIO on Linux, 4K data size, QD=128, 8 jobs.
(4) Latency is measured with random workloads based on FIO on Linux, 4KB data size, QD=1, 1  job.
(5) Power consumption (Average RMS) is measured during the sequential read/write and random read/write operations performed by iometer with the conditions described in (2)(3).
(6) The results of DWPD are obtained in compliance with JESD219A Standards.
